name: Carrot Flower Miniature Loaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together all ingredients except 2 1/2 cups shredded carrots and the oil.
2. Form 12 2-inch meatballs using the mixture.
3. Combine the remaining shredded carrots and oil.
4. Roll each meatball in the shredded carrots.
5. Place the meatballs in greased muffin cups and sprinkle with any leftover shredded carrots.
6. Cover the muffin cups with foil and bake at 375 degrees for 25 minutes.
7. Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 5 minutes until the tips of the carrots begin to brown.
8. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
